description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat, tiled roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch supported by columns, with a balcony running the length of the upper floor. Large windows are arranged in even rows on both levels, providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway with parking spaces, two palm trees at the front, and a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with white and gray dominating the color palette, and the landscaping includes several trees around the perimeter.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch with columns, and a backyard pool area. The property features a driveway, palm trees, and neutral exterior colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, two palm trees, driveway, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement on both floors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full balcony, backyard pool, lounge area, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, umbrella, and the two palm trees at the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, and steps leading to a prominent front door.
